## Summary

Initial project deployment for the Air Force engagement: scope as self-contained work chunks, AI in estimation, and decision that Matt’s team takes austere/offline and on-device AI; React Native vs native to be validated with a time-boxed experiment.

## Project deployment and scope

- **Work structure**: Divide work into **complete, self-contained chunks** (splitting front-end vs back-end had caused inefficiency before).
- **Estimation**: Development time estimates must now **factor in AI assistance**. Rachel to specify time per story to set expectations.

## Offline architecture and AI

- **Matt’s team**: Start work on **austere environment / offline architecture** and **on-device AI integration** (critical, previously unstarted).
- **Harsha’s team**: Continue **multi-user and multi-patient** work in progress.
- Rationale: Balance immediate feature work with long-term infrastructure.

## Native vs React Native

- On-device AI models would be **easier in a native app** than in React Native/Flutter; a full port would be required.
- **Decision**: Run a **time-boxed experiment** in React Native to validate required functionality before committing to a native rewrite.
